name: bakibook
description: BakiBook - Digital Credit Management System for Shopkeepers

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.dev:full: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run start --prefix mobile"
scripts.build:railway: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client --include=dev && npm run build --prefix client
